TourCalculation.title: TourCalculation
TourCalculation.description: Represents a saved calculation for a tour's total cost, including detailed tour information and various categorized expenses.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TourCalculation entity.

savedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this tour calculation was last saved.

tourInfo.description: Details about the tour's itinerary and participants.

allCosts.description: A list of references to all cost items associated with this tour calculation, categorized by type. (Relationship: TourCalculation 1:N CostItem)

TourInfo.title: TourInfo
TourInfo.description: Details about a specific tour, including contact, destination, dates, and participant numbers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TourInfo entity. (Relationship: TourInfo 1:1 TourCalculation)

tourCalculationId.description: Reference to the TourCalculation this information belongs to. (Relationship: TourCalculation 1:1 TourInfo)

mouContact.description: Contact person or organization associated with the Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) for this tour.

groupCode.description: A unique code identifying the specific tour group or package.

destinationCountry.description: The primary country or region designated as the tour's destination.

program.description: A descriptive name or summary of the tour program or itinerary.

startDate.description: The planned start date of the tour. Can be null if not yet determined.

endDate.description: The planned end date of the tour. Can be null if not yet determined.

numDays.description: The total number of days the tour is expected to last.

numNights.description: The total number of nights the tour is expected to last.

numPeople.description: The estimated or actual number of people participating in the tour.

travelerInfo.description: Any additional descriptive information regarding the travelers or group.

CostItem.title: CostItem
CostItem.description: Represents a single cost item for a tour calculation, detailing its description, quantity, cost, and currency.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CostItem entity.

tourCalculationId.description: Reference to the TourCalculation this cost item belongs to. (Relationship: TourCalculation 1:N CostItem)

category.description: The category of this cost item (e.g., 'accommodations', 'flights', 'meals').

description.description: A description of the specific cost item (e.g., 'Hotel A - 3 nights', 'Flight LAX-CDG').

costPerUnit.description: The cost for one unit of this item.

numberOfUnits.description: The quantity of units for this cost item.

totalCost.description: The calculated total cost for this item (costPerUnit multiplied by numberOfUnits).

currency.description: The currency code for the cost (e.g., LAK, USD, EUR).

notes.description: Optional additional notes or details about the cost item.

definition.description: Stores a high-level summary of a tour cost calculation. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' for authorization independence and key 'tourInfo' fields ('groupCode', 'program', 'destinationCountry', 'numPeople') for efficient list queries without 'get()' calls.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this tour calculation.

params.name: tourCalculationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific tour cost calculation.

definition.description: Contains detailed itinerary and participant information for a specific tour calculation. This is a singleton document (named 'details') within its subcollection. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'tourCalculationId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent tour calculation.

params.name: tourCalculationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent tour calculation this information belongs to.

definition.description: Stores individual cost entries associated with a specific tour calculation. Includes denormalized 'ownerId' and 'tourCalculationId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns the parent tour calculation.

params.name: tourCalculationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent tour calculation this cost item belongs to.

params.name: costItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific cost item.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure prioritizes Authorization Independence and Query-Accurate Permissions (QAPs) by adopting a hierarchical path for user-owned data and denormalizing critical authorization and query fields. Each user's tour calculations are stored under their unique user ID, ensuring strict data segregation and straightforward ownership-based security rules.

1.  **`/users/{userId}/tourCalculations/{tourCalculationId}` (TourCalculation):** This top-level collection stores summary information for each tour calculation. To achieve Authorization Independence and support QAPs, each `TourCalculation` document will include `ownerId` (matching `request.auth.uid`) directly within the document. Additionally, key fields from the associated `TourInfo` (namely `groupCode`, `program`, `destinationCountry`, and `numPeople`) are denormalized into this document. This denormalization enables efficient `list` queries (as seen in the client's search and filter functionality) without requiring expensive or insecure `get()` operations on parent or related documents within security rules. For instance, filtering by `groupCode` or sorting by `savedAt` can be done directly on this collection with rule checks solely on `resource.data.ownerId` and the path's `userId` segment.

2.  **`/users/{userId}/tourCalculations/{tourCalculationId}/tourInfo/details` (TourInfo):** This is a singleton subcollection document (`details` as the document ID) for a 1:1 relationship with its parent `TourCalculation`. It holds the comprehensive `TourInfo` details. To ensure Authorization Independence, this document also denormalizes `ownerId` (from the parent `TourCalculation`) and `tourCalculationId` into its own fields. This allows security rules to validate access to this specific `TourInfo` document directly, using `resource.data.ownerId` and `resource.data.tourCalculationId`, eliminating the need to `get()` the parent `TourCalculation` document.

3.  **`/users/{userId}/tourCalculations/{tourCalculationId}/costItems/{costItemId}` (CostItem):** This subcollection stores individual `CostItem` entries for a specific tour calculation. Similar to `TourInfo`, each `CostItem` document denormalizes `ownerId` (from the parent `TourCalculation`) and `tourCalculationId`. This is crucial for Authorization Independence and QAPs. When querying (listing) `CostItem`s for a specific `tourCalculationId`, security rules can verify `request.auth.uid == resource.data.ownerId` and `resource.data.tourCalculationId == path[3]` (where `path[3]` is `tourCalculationId`). This robustly secures `list` operations without relying on parent `get()` calls, maintaining performance and rule simplicity.

This design ensures that all authorization checks can be performed directly on the `request.auth.uid`, `request.path` and `resource.data` of the document being accessed, fulfilling the Authorization Independence mandate. QAPs are supported as `list` queries can be secured by filtering on denormalized `ownerId` and `tourCalculationId` fields, preventing insecure `list` behavior where unauthorized documents might be returned.
